objective: Allow maintainers to render feature issues outside GitHub's interactive form.
userContext: Assistants and integrations create GitHub issues through the API.
currentBehaviour: API-created issues must hand-write Markdown bodies and can drift from the form.
requiredBehaviour: Structured feature data renders a complete issue body matching the feature form sections.
userExperience: Maintainers run the npm script with a JSON file and paste or submit the rendered Markdown.
functionalRequirements: Use the canonical Codex execution contract.
technicalConsiderations: Keep GitHub's issue form intact while detecting drift from shared metadata.
acceptanceCriteria:
- [ ] Missing required fields fail with a clear error
- [ ] Complete data renders all feature sections
codexGuidance: Review the issue template scripts before changing feature issue structure.
